summary: Iteration 25 - Final verification for App Store submission. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: login error messages, forgot password flow, prospect creation with budget slider, import contacts error on web, PRO+ user sees 'Your current plan' on Pricing page.

login_error_messages.description: Login with wrong password shows 'Incorrect email or password' (English) or 'Email ou mot de passe incorrect' (French)

forgot_password_flow.description: Forgot password link visible on login page, flow works correctly with email confirmation

prospect_creation_flow.description: FAB -> Manual entry -> Contact form -> Project form with budget slider -> Submit works correctly

budget_slider.description: Budget slider is visible, draggable, shows Min/Max values, has 'Budget to be defined' and 'Enter manually' options

import_contacts_web_error.description: Import contacts on web shows error: 'Feature exclusively available on the KOLO app on the App Store'

pro_plus_pricing_page.description: PRO+ user sees 'Your current plan' button (grayed out) on PRO+ card in Pricing page

safe_area_ios_headers.description: Safe-area CSS present in landing.css with env(safe-area-inset-top) for iOS notch support

backend_api_tests: ✓ Login with wrong password returns 401 with correct error message
✓ Login with correct credentials returns 200 with token
✓ Forgot password endpoint exists and works
✓ Reset password endpoint exists and works
✓ Create buyer prospect with budget slider values
✓ Plans pricing endpoint returns all plans (free, pro, pro_plus)
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Login page shows error message for wrong password
✓ Forgot password link visible and working
✓ Import contacts shows web error message
✓ Pricing page shows 'Your current plan' for PRO+ user

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified for App Store submission. Key endpoints: /api/auth/login (returns localized error messages), /api/auth/forgot-password, /api/prospects (supports project_type, budget_min, budget_max, delay fields), /api/plans/current, /api/plans/pricing. Test user test@test.com has PRO+ plan with active subscription. Safe-area CSS is in /app/frontend/src/styles/landing.css. Import contacts on web shows localized error message.
